message:
🌱 Rename ksc to kc across entire codebase (#234)

Standardize the project abbreviation from "ksc" to "kc" for consistency
with the kc-agent binary name and KC_ environment variable prefix.

- Go backend: config dir .ksc → .kc, log message, allowed origin URL
- Frontend: 18+ localStorage/IndexedDB keys renamed with migration
  logic for existing users (ksc_ → kc_ on app startup)
- CI/CD: K8s namespace, secrets, Helm release, runner labels, workflow
  names all updated (GitHub secret names intentionally kept as-is)
- Docs: README, CLAUDE.md, issue templates, coordination files, test
  fixtures, Playwright config
- E2E tests: all localStorage key references updated

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
